GameId.description: The unique ID of this game

Season.description: The MLB season of the game

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar).

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game in US Eastern Time

Status.description: Indicates the game's status. Possible values include: Scheduled; InProgress; Final; Suspended; Delayed; Postponed; Canceled; Forfeit; NotNecessary

AwayTeamId.description: The unique TeamID of the away team

HomeTeamId.description: The unique ID of the home team

AwayTeamName.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeTeamName.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the home team

GlobalGameId.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

GlobalAwayTeamId.description: A globally unique ID for the away team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalHomeTeamId.description: A globally unique ID for the home team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

PregameOdds.description: List of Pregame GameOdds from different sportsbooks

LiveOdds.description: Shows a list of live odds from different sportsbooks

HomeTeamScore.description: Score of the home team (updated after game ends to allow for resolving bets)

AwayTeamScore.description: Score of the away team (updated after game ends to allow for resolving bets)

TotalScore.description: The combined scores of the home and away team of the game tied to this event (post-game)

HomeRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of home team for this game

AwayRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of away team for this game

AlternateMarketPregameOdds.description: List of Alternate Market Game Odds from different sportsbooks.
